findings.title: Coupon usage race condition on global/per-user limits
findings.issue: Coupon validation counts usage in separate queries outside the checkout transaction. Concurrent requests can exceed limits between count check and usage recording.
findings.suggestion: Move coupon usage count + recording into the checkout $transaction with SELECT FOR UPDATE.
findings.impact: Multiple concurrent checkouts could exceed coupon usage limits. Low probability at current scale but grows with traffic.

findings.title: Payment initiation outside transaction boundary
findings.issue: Payment initiation (VNPay/Momo URL generation) happens after the order transaction. If the response is lost and user retries, a duplicate order is created.
findings.suggestion: Add idempotency key header support to place-order endpoint and check for existing orders before creating.
findings.impact: Potential duplicate orders on network timeouts. Low probability but high cost.

findings.title: Missing proper admin role guard (JWT only, no role check)
findings.issue: Admin endpoints now require JWT auth (fixed from completely open), but there is no admin role check. Any authenticated user can create coupons and modify pricing.
findings.suggestion: Create an AdminGuard that checks user role, or add role field to User model and check in guard.
findings.impact: Any logged-in customer can create coupons and change product prices. Mitigated by the fact that admin UI doesn't exist yet.

findings.title: No payment webhook logging
findings.issue: IPN handlers have no logging. Failed payments will be silent and undebuggable.
findings.suggestion: Add NestJS Logger calls at each checkpoint (signature check, order lookup, status update).
findings.impact: Debugging payment failures requires code changes. Not blocking for launch.

findings.title: Checkout page missing error catch on initial load
findings.issue: Promise.all for loading addresses and preview has no .catch() handler. If API fails, loading state stays true forever.
findings.suggestion: Add .catch() to set an error state and stop loading.
findings.impact: User sees 'Loading checkout...' indefinitely if API is down.

findings.title: Token retrieval from localStorage on every render
findings.issue: Multiple pages read token directly from localStorage instead of using a centralized auth context. Token changes won't trigger re-renders.
findings.suggestion: Create AuthContext that provides token and wraps the app. Consistent pattern, reactive to login/logout.
findings.impact: UX inconsistency after login/logout. Not blocking for initial launch.

findings.title: Checkout coupon Apply button not wired to preview refresh
findings.issue: Checkout page coupon Apply button has no onClick handler. Coupon code is collected but not applied to preview.
findings.suggestion: Wire button to call previewCheckout(token, couponCode) and update preview state.
findings.impact: Coupon code on checkout page is cosmetic only. Cart page coupon now works (fixed). Users must apply coupon on cart page.

fixesApplied: Fixed N+1 query in PriceEngineService.calculateCart() - batch fetch products
Fixed N+1 query in CartService.mergeGuestCart() - batch fetch active products
Added quantity validation (must be positive) to CartService.addItem()
Added JwtAuthGuard to all coupon admin endpoints (create/update/delete)
Added JwtAuthGuard to all price-tier write endpoints (create/update/delete)
Added input validation to PriceTiersService.create() (minQty, price, maxQty)
Wired coupon Apply button on cart page with validateCoupon API call
Added retry logic to order number generation to handle race conditions
